name: Three Mirrors Creature's Flashes of Flesh
original_name: Three Mirrors Creature's Flashes of Flesh
overview: Days in the life of Dangel Fox, a surefire, relentless, top financial manager. Until she is confronted with her daimon and, pervaded by a sensory spirit, embarks on a piercing and purifying journey.

trailers.title: Three Mirrors Creature's Flashes of Flesh | Dangel/Danger Trailer [REDBAND] - ホラー映画の予告編
